title: Parosela seemanii
taxonomy: Parosela seemanii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The genus Parosela is part of the subfamily Ixoroideae, within the family Rubiaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and phylogenetic relationships with other species in the Rubiaceae family. The plant's classification provides insights into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants. Further research may be needed to confirm the plant's classification within the Ixoroideae subfamily.
